title: Manual copy regression
description: Verify that the agent remembers the MANUAL.md build regression introduced during munx up and names the exact copy path.
query: manual md munx up docker build copy regression
prompt: Explain the MANUAL.md regression that caused munx up to fail after munx-cli init, and name the file path that performs the copy during image build.

requiredFacts: docs/MANUAL.md must exist after munx-cli init.
The missing MANUAL.md caused munx up to fail during image build.
forbiddenFacts: MANUAL.md is optional during munx up.
The failure was caused by Neo4j.
